channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: How to watch British Christmas TV 2025 from anywhere – UK Xmas TV schedule, free streams
item.description: How to watch British Christmas TV 2025 from abroad with a VPN, including marquee specials The Room in the Tower, The War Between the Land and the Sea and Dear Father Christmas.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: Wales vs New Zealand free streams: How to watch Autumn International 2025, TV Channels, Preview & Team News
item.description: All the ways to watch Wales vs New Zealand live streams online, with the All Blacks looking to end their 2025 Autumn International campaign on a high in Cardiff.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: New anti-Mamdani AI videos and the deepfake generation of astroturfing
item.description: A creepy account that’s almost certainly using AI to generate videos of imaginary New Yorkers criticizing mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani raises a frightening prospect: that deepfakes could be used not just to impersonate politicians, but also constituents.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: Is Nvidia opening up its NVLink doors even further? New partnership with AMD will see greater integration across many kinds of chips
item.description: Nvidia NVLink Fusion now integrates with Arm-based Neoverse CPUs, enabling hyperscalers and governments to deploy GPUs efficiently in workstations and servers.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: F# 10 features scoped warning suppression
item.description: The newest version of Microsoft’s multi-paradigm language features a much-sought ability to suppress warnings in specified code sections.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: CIO Essential Insights: Strategies for AI Success
item.description: Research indicates that an alarming number of AI projects fail to achieve their goals and provide hoped for return-on-investment.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Register today: CIO Essential Insights Cloud 2026: New Strategies for Success
item.description: Foundry research shows continued growth in enterprise cloud spending, with new AI initiatives a key driver of that increased investment. But at the same time, concerns about cloud expense, security, management, and skills are also ratcheting up.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What are TPUs? Your guide to tensor processing units and AI acceleration
item.description:
The gist TPUs are Google’s specialized ASICs built exclusively for accelerating tensor-heavy matrix multiplication used in deep learning models.
TPUs use vast parallelism and matrix multiply units (MXUs) to achieve significantly higher throughput and energy efficiency than GPUs for training.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A drying-up Rio Grande basin threatens water security on both sides of the border
item.description: Researchers have completed a full accounting of water uses and losses in the Rio Grande-Bravo basin as it faces severe shortages throughout its range in the United States and Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Susan Montoya Bryan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Downtown San Jose group picks leader at key time for city economy
item.description: The San Jose Downtown Association has picked a new leader as the city seeks a more lively urban core and prepares for a trifecta of mega-events.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Crypto’s path to legitimacy depends on the industry itself, not just politicians
item.description: President Trump recently promised to make America the “crypto capital of the world.” And his administration is working hard to make that pledge a reality. White House officials have established a working group on digital asset markets and directed federal agencies to craft a strategy to cement U.S.
item.dc:creator: Drew Johnson, Fast Company

item.title: How pairing SAST with AI dramatically reduces false positives in code security
item.description: The promise of static application security testing (SAST) has always been the “shift-left” dream, catching vulnerabilities before they ever hit production. But for too long, that promise has been undermined by a frustrating reality with an overwhelming volume of alerts and high false-positive rates.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The what, why and how of agentic AI for supply chain management
item.description: Efficient supply chain management (SCM) requires contending with vast amounts of data, constantly changing variables and multiple stakeholders; factors that have traditionally made SCM difficult for humans, to put it mildly.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft now lets customers run agents on Windows 365 cloud PCs
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled a new type of Windows 365 cloud PC that provides a secure environment for running “computer use” AI agents.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Manage Android apps with the new 'Uninstall' button
item.description: Android users can now manage apps across multiple devices more easily with Google Play Store's updated remote uninstall button in the latest update.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sony, Warner and Universal sign AI music licensing deals with startup Klay
item.description: The world's biggest music labels have struck AI licensing deals with a startup named Klay Vision, the companies said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NetOps teams struggle with AI readiness
item.description: As more enterprise organizations adopt artificial intelligence, research reveals a growing gap between AI plans and network preparedness, according to Broadcom.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Azure HorizonDB: Microsoft goes big with PostgreSQL
item.description: Enterprises need data, and data needs to be stored, with a flexible, portable environment that scales from developers’ laptops to global clouds. That storage also needs to be able to run on any OS and any cloud without breaking the bank. There aren’t many options.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to alienate cloud customers and undermine revenue
item.description: Big Tech has entered an arms race to dominate the artificial intelligence space, with Amazon, Google, and Microsoft investing more than $600 billion into AI development between 2023 and 2025.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Perseverance rover spots mysterious 'visitor from outer space' rock on Mars surface after 4 years
item.description: NASA's Perseverance rover discovers shiny metallic rock on Mars that could be a meteorite from an ancient asteroid, containing high levels of iron and nickel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: One Tech Tip: Do's and don'ts of using AI to help with schoolwork
item.description: The rise of ChatGPT and other AI systems has transformed education, changing how students learn and study.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan And Jocelyn Gecker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NASA unveils close-up pictures of the comet popping by from another star
item.description: NASA is unveiling close-up pictures of the interstellar comet that's making a quick one-and-done tour of our solar system.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: From small business roots to mid-tier powerhouse, this firm is using employee ownership and AI to stay ahead in federal contracting
item.description: "I've got to show up every day changing hearts and minds, showing the innovation and showing how at the end of the day, it's actually better," Travis Mack said.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft drops M365 Copilot price for SMBs, upgrades free Copilot Chat
item.description: Microsoft will reduce the price of Microsoft 365 Copilot for small and mid-sized firms beginning next month. As of Dec. 1, 2025, Microsoft 365 Copilot for Business will cost $21 per user, per month for customers with any Microsoft 365 Business plan.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: When a cyberattack hits, breakdowns inside the organization may be as dangerous as the hackers themselves
item.description: "There's so much focus on threat actors. There's a cost to that, and the cost is that we forget about our own people," Josh Ferenczi said. The post When a cyberattack hits, breakdowns inside the organization may be as dangerous as the hackers themselves first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Gartner: IT spending in Europe to increase 11% in 2026
item.description: US research firm Gartner predicts that IT spending in Europe will increase by 11% to a total of $1.4 trillion in 2026. Growth is expected to be driven by AI, cloud computing and cybersecurity, despite limited IT budgets and few new hires.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How Apple tech can deliver your very own private AI answers
item.description: Yesterday, we looked at how Macs can provide on-premises AI services for you; today we’re going to speculate a little more. Consider this: millions of people use iPhones to access public generative AI (genAI) tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and others.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump calls for federal AI standard, warns China will ‘easily catch’ US
item.description: President Donald Trump on Tuesday called on Congress to establish a single federal standard for AI regulation, as House Republicans explore attaching preemption language to the National Defense Authorization Act that could override state AI laws nationwide.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google releases Gemini 3 with new reasoning and automation features
item.description: Google has launched Gemini 3 and integrated the new AI model into its search engine immediately, aiming to push advanced AI features into consumer and enterprise products faster as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google releases Gemini 3 with new reasoning and automation features
item.description: Google has launched Gemini 3 and integrated the new AI model into its search engine immediately, aiming to push advanced AI features into consumer and enterprise products faster as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: C# 14 touted for extension properties declaration
item.description: Although the C# 14 language was formally launched along with the .NET 10 framework a week ago, Microsoft has put the language update in view again. C# 14 features extension members, a new syntax for declaring extension properties and extension methods.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DLA’s Tech Accelerator Team showing how to spur innovation
item.description: David Koch, the director of research and development at the Defense Logistics Agency, said the Tech Accelerator Team is helping DLA solve problems differently. The post DLA’s Tech Accelerator Team showing how to spur innovation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Now that the shutdown is over, contracting officers have a lot to catch up on
item.description: "For a workforce that's already stretched pretty thin, playing 'gotcha' with them just doesn't seem very fair right now," Emily Murphy said. The post Now that the shutdown is over, contracting officers have a lot to catch up on first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple’s macOS: AI for the rest of us
item.description: Apple is building the world’s best ecosystem for artificial intelligence. The Mac, supported by iPads and iPhones, ticks nearly every box for the inevitable future of the technology.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
